catalog.title: Data Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Browse the automatically generated documentation of your Power BI Semantic Models.
catalog.select_model_hint: Select a Semantic Model from the list to see a preview.
catalog.help_catalog_intro: The SemaDoc Data Catalog provides a central overview of all documented Power BI Semantic Models. Here is a guide to the interface elements:
catalog.help_catalog_workspace_desc: Use the "Workspace" dropdown to filter the list of Semantic Models by the Power BI workspace they are published in. Select "All Workspaces" to see all models.
catalog.help_catalog_model_desc: The left sidebar lists all available Semantic Models. Click on a model to see a preview of its documentation (model_documentation.md) on the right.
catalog.help_catalog_preview_desc: To the right of the model list, the model overview is displayed as a rendered preview. Use the "View full documentation" button to open the detailed documentation with all tabs (tables, measures, import logic, etc.).
catalog.help_catalog_search_desc: The search field performs a full-text search across the entire data catalog — across all models, tables, measures, and other documentation sections. Results are grouped by workspace, model, and document type. For each match, you can click "Preview" to view the relevant section in a side panel without leaving the page.

doc_labels.page_description: Automatically generated documentation of the Semantic Model
doc_labels.intro_text: This documentation was generated fully automatically by SemaDoc.
doc_labels.svg_file_ref_unsupported: SVG file references are not supported in the viewer. Please paste the SVG content directly.

viewer.page_title: SemaDoc Standalone Viewer — View Markdown Documentation
viewer.page_description: Upload your SemaDoc Markdown files and view the documentation right in your browser — no server upload required.
viewer.title: SemaDoc Standalone Viewer
viewer.subtitle: Upload your SemaDoc Markdown files and view the documentation right in your browser — no server upload required.
viewer.drop_text: Drag up to 7 Markdown files here or click to select.
viewer.drop_hint: Supported files: model_documentation.md, table_documentation.md, measure_documentation.md, import_logic_documentation.md, calculation_item_documentation.md, udf_documentation.md, security_documentation.md
viewer.privacy_note: Your files never leave the browser — everything is processed locally.
viewer.paste_placeholder: Paste any Markdown text here (incl. Mermaid diagrams)…
